messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Say hello world in a Node app with a single endpoint
Clarifications:
None
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Say hello world in a Node app with a single endpoint",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "setup-project",
      "title": "Create project directory and repository",
      "description": "Create a new folder for the Node app and optionally initialize a git repository to track changes.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A new project directory exists and (optional) a git repository is initialized (git status runs without error)."
    },
    {
      "id": "initialize-npm",
      "title": "Initialize npm and package.json",
      "description": "Run npm init (or npm init -y) inside the project folder to create a package.json with project metadata.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "setup-project"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "package.json is present in the project root and contains name and version fields."
    },
    {
      "id": "install-express",
      "title": "Install Express dependency",
      "description": "Install the Express package (npm install express) to provide HTTP server functionality for the app.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "initialize-npm"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "node_modules contains express and package.json lists express in dependencies."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-app-file",
      "title": "Add main application file",
      "description": "Create a JavaScript file (e.g., index.js or app.js) that will initialize the Express app and export or run the server.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-express"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A main app file exists and imports express without syntax errors when run with node."
    },
    {
      "id": "implement-hello-endpoint",
      "title": "Implement single Hello World endpoint",
      "description": "Add a route (e.g., GET / or GET /hello) that responds with the text 'Hello World' and HTTP 200 status.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "create-app-file"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "A request to the endpoint returns HTTP 200 and body exactly 'Hello World' (plain text)."
    },
    {
      "id": "add-start-script",
      "title": "Add npm start script",
      "description": "Add a start script to package.json (e.g., \"start\": \"node index.js\") to run the server via npm start.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "initialize-npm"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "npm start launches the Node process and the server becomes reachable."
    },
    {
      "id": "test-endpoint",
      "title": "Test the endpoint locally",
      "description": "Start the server and use curl or a browser to request the endpoint and verify the response and status code.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "implement-hello-endpoint",
        "add-start-script"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "A curl or HTTP request to the app returns status 200 and body 'Hello World'; automated test (optional) passes."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down incremental: set up project and package management, add dependencies, create main file, implement the minimal endpoint, add a start script, then verify with manual or automated tests."
}
